handlingClasses.meaning: The operation must stop because continuing would fabricate graph, runtime, or proof truth.
The product may use a declared lower-capability path while surfacing the degraded behavior.
The AI worker may append commandGraph repair commands and rerun proof.
The creator must see the diagnostic; last-valid output policy may apply if declared.

codes.creatorMessage: Backend is missing a required capability; use declared fallback or visible disabled state.
Shader compile failed; keep last valid output if the node declares that policy.
Rendered frame is black; AI worker may repair only through commandGraph.
Node parameter is outside its admitted range.
Required port is missing; block runtime admission.
Connection violates admitted port type contract.
AI proposal attempted direct graph mutation instead of commandGraph.
Importer attempted to install editorGraph truth directly.
Frame/time/dirty event order cannot be replayed.
